title: Fox Soft Dog Toys for Small Dogs Squeaky Dog Toys Plush Puppy Toy
features: Puppy Squeaker Dog Toy - Dog plush toys with squeaker are easier to get the dog's attention, these soft squeaker dog toys help to reduce dogs boredom, anxiety and depression.
Soft Dog Toys - Our dog plush toys are soft, durable for puppy small medium dogs and teething puppies. The perfect companion for playful pups. Not suitable for aggressive chewers or large dogs.
Interactive Dog Toys - Dog chew toys for boredom, create a connection between you and your dog. Developing play skills and keeping puppies mouths busy and satisfied.
Dog Toothbrush Toy - Corduroy material on the surface of the dog soft toys, undulating surface, rich in grain design, are good for your dog to keep teeth cleaning.
Easy To Clean - Machine washable. Soft puppy toys for playful games.
description: 1.Animal design, cute, beautiful and attractive. 2.Made of non-toxic high quality corduroy fabric material, bite-resistant, soft, durable and 100% safe.Soft material will protect pet's teeth when pet grinds teeth and cleans teeth. 3.Not easy to lose hair, not easy to vacuum and it feels smooth and elastic. Great for fun and entertainment. 4.Pets will also love to chew, fetch and play.Squeeze to relax and release stress. 5.Built-in bb whistle, cute sound when squeezed. Specifications: Material: Corduroy, BB whistle Style: Crocodile, Rabbit, Mouse, Monkey, Pig, Sheep, Duck, Fox, Rhinoceros, Elephant, Bear, Lion, Dog
